summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Budget Request module after removal of customer-related categories. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified page loads, dialog opens, 9 non-customer categories displayed, SKU workflow for Event Sponsorship - Stock works, and Director approval/reject functionality is present.

minor.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 for creation - minor HTTP status code inconsistency

issues: Missing aria-describedby for accessibility - console warning

seed_data_creation: Created test budget requests during backend API testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Budget Request module updated to remove customer-related categories. All 9 categories have requires_lead=False. Only event_sponsorship_stock has requires_sku=True. Customer expenses are now handled via Expense Requests at Lead/Account level.

Backend API Tests (15 passed).Budget categories - no customer categori: PASS - Verified customer_onboarding, customer_gifting, staff_gifting, free_trial NOT present
Backend API Tests (15 passed).event_sponsorship_stock requires_sku: PASS - Only this category has requires_sku=True
Backend API Tests (15 passed).POST /api/budget-requests (submit): PASS - Creates with status='pending_approval' and calculates total_amount
Backend API Tests (15 passed).GET /api/budget-requests: PASS - Returns list of user's budget requests
Backend API Tests (15 passed).PUT /api/budget-requests/{id}/approve (r: PASS - Director can reject with reason
Backend API Tests (15 passed).GET /api/cogs/sku-price/{city}/{sku}: PASS - Endpoint works for SKU price lookup
Backend API Tests (15 passed).GET /api/master-locations/flat: PASS - Returns cities for Event City dropdown

Frontend UI Tests.Event Sponsorship - Stock enables SKU fi: PASS - SKU dropdown, Bottles, Price/Unit columns appear
Frontend UI Tests.Event City dropdown: PASS - Shows all cities (Bengaluru, Chennai, Mumbai, etc.)
Frontend UI Tests.Director view - Pending Approvals sectio: PASS - Shows pending requests from other users
Frontend UI Tests.Director view - Approve/Reject buttons: PASS - Both buttons visible in request detail dialog
Frontend UI Tests.Budget Request history table: PASS - Shows Title, Total Amount, Categories, Created, Status
